## Subject
What system, event, discourse, or workflow is being analyzed?

## Boundary Under Review
What boundary matters most here?

## Suspected Failure Mode
What appears to be breaking?

## Why This Case Matters
Why is this a useful teaching or proof artifact?

## Proposed Intervention Angle
What bounded intervention seems most relevant?

## Evidence Sources
What materials support the case study?

## Done Condition
What would make the case study complete?
